title: A rose is a rose is a rose...

lines.target: We've got a lot of nice things for you in the next few lessons.
lines.base: Tenemos muchas cosas fantásticas que mostrarle en las próximas lecciones.

lines.target: Stop!! How dare you be so sloppy with your vocabulary, for heaven's sake.
lines.base: ¡Alto ahí! ¿Cómo puede ser tan descuidado? Utilice su vocabulario, por amor de Dios.

lines.target: English is such a rich language — even a simple noise can be described in many different ways. Look...
lines.base: El inglés es un idioma tan rico — incluso un simple ruido se puede describir de muchas maneras distintas. Fíjese...

lines.target: The generator was humming softly in the corner of the room.
lines.base: El grupo electrógeno ronroneaba dulcemente en el rincón de la alcoba.

lines.target: In the background you could hear the steady ticking of the huge clock.
lines.base: En el fondo se podía escuchar el tic-tac regular del enorme reloj.

lines.target: A log fire crackled and hissed in the grate: it was too quiet!
lines.base: Un fuego de leña chisporroteaba y silbaba en la rejilla: ¡había un gran silencio!

lines.target: Outside, footsteps clattered over the roof of the adjacent house.
lines.base: Afuera, pasos resonaban con estrépito sobre el techo de la casa vecina.

lines.target: Somewhere in the distance, a door banged shut. There was a rattle of a machine-gun
lines.base: En algún lugar en la lejanía, se cerró una puerta de golpe. Hubo una ráfaga de ametralladora

lines.target: followed by a scream of pain. A heavy weight thudded into the bushes with a noise of snapping branches.
lines.base: seguida de un grito de dolor. Algo pesado cayó entre los arbustos con un ruido de ramas que se quebraban.

lines.target: A torch snapped on behind him and he was dazzled by the powerful light.
lines.base: De repente una linterna se encendió detrás de él y quedó deslumbrado por el potente rayo de luz.

lines.target: He caught a glimpse of a tall dark figure disappearing into the night.
lines.base: Vislumbro una gran figura negra que desapareció en la noche.

lines.target: In the distance, he could see the tingling glow of the city lights.
lines.base: A lo lejos, podía ver el reconfortante reflejo de las luces de la ciudad.

lines.target: Moonlight shimmered on the lake, while above his head the stars twinkled in the velvet sky.
lines.base: La luz de la luna centelleaba sobre la superficie del lago, y por encima de su cabeza, las estrellas centelleaban en el cielo satinado.

lines.target: He turned around, staring out to sea. A light winked in the darkness — a ship was coming into the harbour.
lines.base: Se dio la vuelta, escudriñando el mar. Una luz parpadeó en la obscuridad — un barco entraba en el puerto.

lines.target: He shone his own torch onto his watch. Four o'clock. The gold watch strap glittered.
lines.base: Alumbró su reloj con su propia linterna. Las cuatro. La correa de oro del reloj brilló.

lines.target: Pearls of dew glistened on the grass as dawn began to rise.
lines.base: Las perlas de rocío resplandecían aquí y allá sobre la hierba a medida que comenzaba a amanecer.

lines.target: A triumphant gleam came into his eyes. — He's going to try and escape by sea. I'll catch him at the port.
lines.base: Una mirada centelleante de triunfo apareció en sus ojos. — Él va a tratar de escapar por el mar. Le atraparé en el puerto.

gap_candidates.target: Stop!! How dare you be so sloppy with your vocabulary, for heaven's sake.
The generator was humming softly in the corner of the room.
In the background you could hear the steady ticking of the huge clock.
A log fire crackled and hissed in the grate: it was too quiet!
Outside, footsteps clattered over the roof of the adjacent house.
Somewhere in the distance, a door banged shut. There was a rattle of a machine-gun
followed by a scream of pain. A heavy weight thudded into the bushes with a noise of snapping branches.
A torch snapped on behind him and he was dazzled by the powerful light.
He caught a glimpse of a tall dark figure disappearing into the night.
In the distance, he could see the tingling glow of the city lights.
Moonlight shimmered on the lake, while above his head the stars twinkled in the velvet sky.
He turned around, staring out to sea. A light winked in the darkness — a ship was coming into the harbour.
He shone his own torch onto his watch. Four o'clock. The gold watch strap glittered.
Pearls of dew glistened on the grass as dawn began to rise.
A triumphant gleam came into his eyes. — He's going to try and escape by sea. I'll catch him at the port.
